---
title: "Slides"
author: "Varun"
format:
  clean-nav-revealjs:
    slide-number: "c/t"
    # Point at a project-local nav-sections.js to override the default
    # sidebar sections. Remove this block to use the default sections
    # shipped with the extension.
    # include-in-header:
    #   - text: |
    #       <script src="nav-sections.js"></script>
subtitle: "A starter template for the clean-nav theme"
---

## Verification and Robust Control of Hybrid Systems
::: {.column width="50%"}
- View robust periodic walking as maximizing the size of a local invariant set
- Rapidly compute an approximation of the forward-invariant set using interval analysis
- Fully differentiable method lets us maximize the size of the invariant set by optimizing the feedback controller
:::
::: {.column width="5%"}
:::
::: {.column width="45%"}
![](images/7Link.PNG){fig-align="center" width=50%}

![](images/NT_No_Control.png){fig-align="center" width=100%}
![](images/NT_Opt_Control.png){fig-align="center" width=100%}
:::
